description_long: This is a rectangular, upright juice carton labeled 'FARAGELLO GOLD' with a white and gold color scheme. The front of the carton features vibrant images of assorted fruits, including pineapple, apple, banana, orange, and blueberries, suggesting a mixed fruit juice. The top of the carton is fitted with a white screw cap for pouring, and the sides display the brand name vertically in bold gold letters. One side of the carton contains detailed nutritional information and product details in multiple languages. The packaging appears to be made of laminated cardboard, typical for juice cartons, with a glossy finish that reflects light subtly.
description: A white and gold rectangular juice carton with a screw cap and colorful mixed fruit illustrations on the front.
description_view_0: Front view showing the 'FARAGELLO GOLD' label and vivid fruit illustrations.
description_view_1: Side view with the brand name 'FARAGELLO' displayed vertically and a glimpse of the cap.
description_view_2: Back view featuring the nutritional information panel and product details.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the vertical brand name and partial fruit illustration visible.
attribute_juice_flavor_illustration: pineapple, apple, banana, orange, and blueberries
